prompt: I'm building a slide template for my R-Ladies chapter. What are the exact brand colours (with hex codes) and fonts I should use, and the key accessibility rules I need to follow?
assertions: Gives Blue Violet as the main colour with hex #881ef9
Gives Bastille Black #2f2f30 and Lavender White #ededf4 instead of pure black/white
States minimum text size of 6 points
States at least 1.5 pt line spacing
Says avoid italic, underline, and all-caps (use bold for emphasis)
Points to brand.yml / glamour / a machine-readable brand asset
